mano_cua.result_summary: 退格键逻辑错误：输入框有未确认文本'testing'时按Backspace，整个文本消失且最后一个标签'world'被同时删除(tags从[hello,world]变为[hello])。正确行为应仅删除输入框最后一个字符，不影响已添加标签
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Backspace key logic bug: when input has uncommitted text 'testing', pressing Backspace clears ALL input text AND deletes the last tag 'world' simultaneously. Tags changed from ['hello','world'] to ['hello']. Expected behavior: Backspace should only delete one character from input when input is non-empty, not affect existing tags.
